decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressively ramping up mana using Amulet of Vigor and bounce lands like Simic Growth Chamber to quickly assemble powerful combos. The key strategy involves utilizing cards like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift to search for important lands and overwhelm opponents with massive creatures. The deck also includes utility cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Summoner's Pact to find specific pieces when needed. Overall, the main goal is to efficiently assemble the pieces needed to overpower opponents and secure a win through explosive plays and strategic resource management.

The main focus of this UW Control deck is to control the game through countering spells, removal, and card advantage. By utilizing a variety of control elements such as counterspells, removal spells, and card draw, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing its own win condition. The deck also includes a companion, Kaheera, the Orphanguard, to provide additional value and synergy with the rest of the deck. Overall, this deck seeks to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through careful decision-making and strategic play.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble a powerful combination of Broodscale Bloodchief, Devourer of Destiny, and Glaring Fleshraker to overwhelm the opponent with a high amount of damage output. The deck includes cards like Malevolent Rumble, Emrakul, the Promised End, and Kozilek's Command to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Ancient Stirrings helps to consistently find key combo pieces. Overall, the deck aims to win the game through a fast and efficient combo strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour, then bringing them back into play with cards like Unearth and Persist. The goal is to reanimate strong creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones to quickly overwhelm the opponent and win the game. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push help control the opponent's board while Abhorrent Oculus and Psychic Frog provide additional utility. The deck is able to quickly assemble its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy, making it a potent threat in Modern 1 vs 1.

The deck focuses on utilizing Broodscale Bloodchief's ability to sacrifice creatures to deal damage to the opponent. By combining it with cards like Writhing Chrysalis and Glaring Fleshraker, the deck can generate a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. The deck also includes support cards like Urza's Saga and Ancient Stirrings to search for key pieces of the combo. Additionally, the inclusion of Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End provides an alternate win condition. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly and efficiently reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. It also utilizes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Prismatic Ending to control the game and protect its combo pieces. The deck has a solid mana base to support its color requirements and includes cards like Faithful Mending for card advantage and Superior Spider-Man for additional combo potential. The goal is to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats.

The deck focuses on using artifact creatures and artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a high-speed aggressive strategy. It includes cards that generate artifact tokens, mana acceleration with Mox Opal, and utility spells like Tormod's Crypt and Pithing Needle. The main win condition is to create a board presence with efficient threats like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with counter spells and removal options. The deck aims to outpace the opponent by quickly deploying threats and putting pressure on their life total.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to utilize fast mana acceleration and powerful creature synergies to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By efficiently ramping into high-impact threats like Guide of Souls and White Orchid Phantom, while utilizing removal spells like Solitude and Skyclave Apparition to control the board, the deck aims to establish early dominance and maintain pressure throughout the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Badgermole Cub provide additional value and versatility, allowing the deck to adapt to various matchups effectively.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive creature plays, with cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly build a board presence. It also includes powerful removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Lightning Bolt to clear the way for attackers. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional buffs and ways to close out games quickly. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of efficient creatures and direct damage spells.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple, allowing for powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker to be played ahead of schedule. Control elements are also included with cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Return to disrupt the opponent's strategies. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats while maintaining control of the game through various removal spells and disruption.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It includes Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for additional power and evasion, along with cards like Guide of Souls and Ocelot Pride to pump up your creatures. Goblin Bombardment provides additional reach, while cards like Thraben Charm and Voice of Victory help protect your board and push through for the final points of damage. The manabase is streamlined to ensure consistent access to the colors needed for your spells.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. Utilizing a combination of fast mana sources and efficient creatures like Ragavan and Guide of Souls, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence and apply pressure to the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Bombardment and Practiced Offense allows for additional reach and damage output. With a mix of burn spells, creatures, and combat tricks, the deck aims to close out the game swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful combo that generates large amounts of mana and allows for explosive plays. It also includes key support cards such as Eldrazi Temple, Ancient Stirrings, and Ugin's Labyrinth to help find and protect the combo pieces. The inclusion of cards like Devourer of Destiny, Glaring Fleshraker, and Emrakul, the Promised End adds additional threats to pressure opponents. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm opponents with its powerful creatures and spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying threats using low-cost creatures and efficient removal spells to control the board. By applying pressure early in the game with cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents before they have a chance to stabilize. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah serves as a powerful finisher, while cards like Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm provide additional reach and versatility. The inclusion of Blood Moon and Static Prison helps disrupt opponents' game plans, making it difficult for them to effectively counter the aggressive strategy of the deck.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent by using low-cost and efficient burn spells, along with aggressive creatures like Goblin Guide and Monastery Swiftspear. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game and finish them off before they have a chance to stabilize. It also includes cards like Eidolon of the Great Revel to punish the opponent for playing spells and prevent them from gaining life. The deck's mana base is optimized to support its aggressive strategy and ensure consistent draws.

This deck focuses on utilizing creatures with high mana costs to quickly fill the graveyard, then casting Living End to return all creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield. The deck includes cycling creatures like Street Wraith and Shardless Agent to help dig for combo pieces, along with disruption spells and counters like Force of Negation and Subtlety to protect the combo. The deck also includes some powerful creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Colossal Skyturtle to help close out the game once the combo is assembled.
